response.justification: Bogdan is a credentialed Staff-level engineer with genuine TypeScript and cloud depth (AWS CDK, MongoDB, high-throughput micro-services), and his current role at re:cinq explicitly covers AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators — directly relevant to the job's key technologies. That said, the role requires 8+ years delivering production-grade AI solutions; his GenAI work only surfaces from April 2025, leaving a large gap against that bar. Python is entirely absent from his skill list, and there is no mention of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation, or multi-agent frameworks such as LangGraph or CrewAI. His forward-deployed, customer-facing consulting experience is also unclear from the resume.
strengths: Direct experience building MCP servers and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq, matching several key technologies in the job spec
Sustained Staff-level seniority across multiple companies with demonstrated mentoring, public teaching, and engineering-culture ownership
Strong data-systems foundation: sub-millisecond micro-services at Dunnhumby, AWS CDK + MongoDB pricing pipelines at Optilyz, and a geo-data platform serving NGO users at scale
concerns: Python is entirely absent from skills and employment history; the role lists Python as a primary required language for AI tooling
No mention of RAG, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks — all listed as required or preferred qualifications
Production AI/GenAI experience appears to begin in April 2025, falling well short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions
